response.justification: The candidate exceeds minimum requirements with 19+ years of engineering experience and a BS in Computer Science, demonstrating strong technical breadth. However, multiple critical gaps exist for a director-level AI strategy principal engineer role: no advanced degree in AI/ML, AI expertise limited to recent infrastructure work rather than strategic products, no director-level leadership experience, and no track record of customer partnerships or technology advisory. The candidate is a capable staff-level engineer but lacks the strategic vision, AI depth, and principal-level experience profile required.
strengths: Significantly exceeds 15-year minimum with 19+ years across web, mobile, hardware, and infrastructure engineering demonstrating sustained technical growth and breadth
Current engagement with AI agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at Naver shows active involvement with cutting-edge AI tooling and emerging technologies
Long-standing founder of open-source Geo-Data platform (2016-present) demonstrates sustained technical vision and ability to lead independent projects
concerns: Lacks Master's or PhD in AI-related field; AI expertise is recent (April 2025) and infrastructure-focused rather than strategic product development with demonstrated platforms
Currently at Staff Software Engineer level with no demonstrated director-level strategic leadership, customer advisory, or technology partnership experience required for principal IC role
No track record of identifying strategic platform differentiation opportunities or advising on AI adoption; open-source background differs from enterprise strategic impact required

key_factors.factor: Director-level strategic AI leadership and customer partnerships
Recognized AI platform products and strategic differentiation expertise
Years of engineering experience (19+ exceeds 15-year requirement)
